title: Senior Financial Analyst - Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
company: Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
